frontier_status.next_step: Use the triage card to justify a stronger profile method while keeping the signal scoped to risk detection.
Use the readiness card to stage one narrow dry run before claiming any benchmark bridge.
Use the review queue to decide which critic-style review queue item should be read first.
Use the prioritization card to map one tiny sanity-check slice without claiming a completed benchmark.
Use the demo walkthrough to shape a short demo walk before any heavier app build.
Run python -m src.separation_phase_diagram to refresh experimental/frontier phase outputs.
Run python -m src.router_boundary_alignment to audit router v2 against gold phase boundaries.
Run python -m src.error_type_boundary_report to explain separation harm via error types.
Run python -m src.speaker_profile_spectral_embedding_baseline for the NoOverlap narrow baseline.
Run python -m src.frontier_boundary_consolidated_report to merge Wave1 boundary findings.
Run python -m src.meeteval_gold_cer_cpwer_reconciliation to compare gold CER and cpWER.
Run python -m src.synthetic_router_boundary_alignment for held-out synthetic router audit.
Run python -m src.risk_aware_boundary_audit to audit the risk-aware selector.
Run python -m src.cascade_boundary_bridge to bridge cascade strategies to phase boundaries.
Run python -m src.speaker_profile_multisignal_gold_sweep for all-gold multisignal sweep.
Run python -m src.llm_critic_qualitative_brief_light_mid for qualitative/demo Light/Mid brief.
Run python -m src.external_validation_license_confirmation to record AISHELL-4 CC BY-SA research confirmation.
